title: MCB Price in Pakistan 2026 — Miniature Circuit Breaker 1P, 2P, 3P & 4P Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: MCB price in Pakistan 2026: 1P from PKR 150, 2P from PKR 350, 3P from PKR 700, 4P from PKR 1,000. Complete guide to B/C/D curve selection, breaking capacity (Icn 6kA vs 10kA), ampere sizing for homes, offices and industrial sites, WAPDA main fuse coordination, and Pakistan-specific IEC 60898-1 compliance. Includes RCBO guidance for wet-area shock protection.
tags: mcb, miniature circuit breaker, circuit breaker, MCB price pakistan, 1 pole MCB, 2 pole MCB, 3 pole MCB, 4 pole MCB, B curve C curve D curve, breaking capacity, IEC 60898-1, RCBO pakistan, DB box pakistan, distribution board, WAPDA MCB
